subcodes.first_line: The Call of God hath been raised from the direction of 'Akká, proclaiming: Blessed be they that have turned their faces unto God [3.5s]... ...From time immemorial, they who have been outwardly invested with authority have debarred men from setting their faces towards God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندآء الله از شطر عکا مرتفع و میفرماید طوبی از برای نفوسیکه الی الله توجه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pilgrims, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @status of kings; future of monarchy
